results.title: Mnema
results.overview: In a world of obstacles and labyrinths, Mnema tries to find her way into each level of what resembles a video game. Between reality and fantasy, Mnema hears the voices of women who once were in her place.

results.title: We Get Better When We Tan Moose Hides
results.original_title: Deneege Leł Ghu Kk’ots’eedeneeyh Te Heł Hoozoonh Ts’e Denots’edeneeyh
results.overview: The tradition of tanning hides with brains was once practiced by every Dené person in Alaska. An art that was nearly lost by assimilation, Kathleen Hildebrand works with a group of Dené women at her urban backyard hide camp in the heart of Chen’o (Fairbanks) to revive this tradition. One of the few films out there narrated in Denaakk’e, we learn alongside the women how the hides have healing.

results.title: You're Just Tired
results.overview: Feeling isolated, lonely, and bored, new mother Lydia struggles to grasp what's real and what's her imagination.

results.title: The Prayer of The Rose
results.overview: An emotional journey of a teenage boy asking God to liberate him from his self-inflicted downfall.

results.title: No Good In Sight: A Story
results.original_title: No Good In Sight: A Story
results.overview: Upon learning his son suffers from a severe illness, he turns to illegal deeds to scrape together surgery funds. With every reluctant choice, he holds an inner monologue with his late father, for whom he harbors lingering guilt and resentment. Desperate to live a different life, he strives to become a far better dad than his own father was.

results.title: Skylark
results.overview: Post-Soviet border demarcations in Central Asia fuel lasting territorial conflicts. Centered on Kyrgyz teen Abek’s coming-of-age, the story unfolds in a village near the Tajik border, where he was brought up by his grandmother Ene.After her death, Abek tries to inter her beside his grandfather, whose grave now lies across the redrawn frontier in Tajikistan. Amid local folklore and persistent border tensions, his tomb-seeking journey unveils lingering historical wounds plaguing Central Asian borderlands.

results.title: Damn Y'all Fine
results.overview: Damn Y’all Fine follows Baltimore’s Black queer artists and activists as they style identity on their own terms, how the city shapes the way they express gender, sexuality, and self.

results.title: Halima
results.overview: Halima lives on Morocco’s coast and makes a living by gathering and selling mussels. An unknown phone call brings her long-buried past back to light.  After her husband passed away, Halima stayed alone in their old house in the mountains. The land is undergoing drastic changes, leaving her home, livelihood and sense of belonging all precarious. Grief, hardship and displacement follow one after another. Though fate knocks her down time and again, she never surrenders.A former photojournalist, the director captures this one-woman battle with stark cinematography. Free from grand outcries, the film lays bare her everyday resilience. Amid constant flux and loss, this woman stands firm, striving to carve out her own place in the world.

results.title: Noite Experimental
results.overview: Inca trepanations, bestiaries, the attempted sale of the Parque Lage land for the construction of a cemetery, and Pinscher and Yorkshire Terrier clubs are some of the events we witness here, in these three fictional projects for the historic mansion in the Botanical Garden: the Carioca Shangri-La, the Giza Necropolis, and Machu Picchu. The video was made in the context of the course Archive, Montage and Memory, developed from images from the collection of the Visual Arts School of Parque Lage, Memória Lage.

results.title: Saint Valentine
results.overview: A coming-of-age story where two sexually frustrated sisters, who are unsupervised and isolated, encounter two handsome Mormon American boys who come knocking on their door.

results.title: The Wind's Thirst
results.overview: In Colombia's La Guajira desert, three Wayuu guardians fight corporate powers exploiting their ancestral land, as green energy projects and a vital reservoir serve everyone but them.

results.title: Be Forever Yamato - Rebel 3199 - Part 6: Blue Labyrinth
results.original_title: Be Forever Yamato - Rebel 3199 - Part 6: Blue Labyrinth
results.overview: Part 6 of the theatrical version of the third Yamato remake show.

results.title: Negative Space
results.overview: Three detectives on the verge of solving the case of the serial killer.

results.title: Borrowed Sea
results.overview: Trapped in a bathroom overgrown with water and vegetation, a young woman tries to adapt to the unexpected visits of a strange boy who keeps observing her.

results.title: Room 404 Incident
results.overview: As part of a school project about local urban legends, four friends decide to explore an abandoned building scheduled for demolition in the coming weeks. While filming content for their video channel, they discover a door marked only with the number 404. The room does not appear on any official floor plan. At first, it seems like nothing more than an empty space, but as they continue exploring the surrounding hallways, the group begins to notice something is wrong. Corridors repeat themselves, doors lead back to the same places, and the path they came from slowly disappears. When one of the friends vanishes without a trace, the others must uncover the truth behind Room 404 before they disappear as well. Room 404 Incident is a found-footage horror short film that follows the recovered recordings from the phones and cameras left behind after the incident.

results.title: Rising Embers
results.overview: Two thousand years. One truth. Carried by ordinary people who refused to let their faith be silenced.

results.title: Горбушка. Сердце русского рока
results.overview: A tribute to the legendary Gorbushka from its main characters: musicians, producers, and sellers.

results.title: Mumford & Sons: The House Band
results.overview: Mumford & Sons invite the camera onto the train for one of the most purely pleasurable concert docs in years. Featuring Noah Kahan, Darius Rucker, Lainey Wilson, Maggie Rogers, and several other special guests along for the ride, the journey captures the intimacy and camaraderie between all the performers both onstage and off.

results.title: Cinco botones
results.overview: An anciet leyend is back to scare a group of history students

results.title: Chuckle Chuckle
results.overview: Aiming to become comedians, Sahara and his comedy partner Setoguchi work together on their act, "Ultrasweet Sourpork", until unfortunate circumstances lead to their disbandment. Hindered by roadblocks on the path to success, Sahara suddenly encounters an "ideal" version of himself—an ultra-famous comedian. Boasting rich knowledge for success as a comedian, this "ideal" Sahara begins meddling with the real Sahara's life.

results.title: NJPW Yuji Nagata Produce Blue Justice XVIII
results.original_title: NJPW Yuji Nagata Produce Blue Justice XVIII
results.overview: Yuji Nagata Produce Blue Justice XVIII was a professional wrestling event produced by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) and organized by Yuji Nagata. Held on June 20, 2026, at City Gymnasium in Kimitsu, Chiba, Japan, the annual Blue Justice show served as Nagata’s hometown charity event.

results.title: Burisch
results.overview: Dan Burisch recalls his time at Area 51.

results.title: Poachers
results.overview: A story of a babysitter, trying to bang a smoke show cougar. JUST LIKE ALL OF US. He gets deep into detective work to find the cougars missing baby.

results.title: Superfan No. 1
results.overview: In Superfan No. 1, a seven-year-old South Asian girl is about to discover a massive secret about her hero, her father.

results.title: autism is an altar
results.overview: Three vignettes across three generations of japanese americans explore the intersections of incarceration, ableism and anti-Asian racism from the perspectives of a first-generation Issei woman at Angel Island Immigration Station, a second-generation Nisei woman incarcerated at Amache “War Relocation Center” and a fourth-generation Yonsei’s process of autism diagnosis.

results.title: Home Visit
results.overview: A queer couple prepares lunch for one of their mothers, hoping the meal might change her mind about their relationship.

results.title: Enjoy the View
results.overview: A recollection of memory in honor of caretakers everywhere.

results.title: Где я пригодился
results.overview: From childhood passion to big-time IT: stories about how curiosity, passionate stubbornness, and the habit of finding your own solutions become key professional superpowers.

results.title: Mither
results.overview: During the evacuation of her island home, Rebecca McKay refuses to leave due to her belief that her missing son may still be alive. Despite the insistence of her husband Calum, to abandon hope, Rebecca goes to extremes to find an answer.

results.title: I Might Have Infected You
results.overview: Markus and his friends make fun of the OnlyFans creator Maya Andersson during a live-stream. The mask slips when Markus subscribes to her Only Fans-profile in secret. This marks the beginning of a digital relationship, where the line between the imagined and the real begins to blur.

results.title: Exposed
results.overview: After Erzhan’s death, five friends try to reconstruct the events of that night. But the closer they get to the truth, the clearer it becomes that the one responsible is among them — and Aidana is the first to understand it, without saying a word.

results.title: Returning Home
results.overview: Clara reluctantly returns to her childhood to be with her sister, Alma, and help pack up their recently deceased mother's house. When a vase is accidently broken, the unsaid words between the two sisters come to the surface.

results.title: What if I Die Flying Over Oklahoma?
results.original_title: What if I Die Flying Over Oklahoma?
results.overview: Trapped in the middle seat, singer-songwriter Rae Isla spirals into an existential crisis that transforms airplane anxiety into a surreal question of "what if?"

results.title: Cheesy Fingers
results.overview: squeak squeak squeak squeak CHEESE squeak squeak

results.title: Synthetic Sincerity
results.overview: Marc Isaacs makes a deal with The Synthetic Sincerity Lab, an AI research project affiliated with the University of Southern England. There, researchers are investigating the possibility of teaching AI characters authenticity, using characters from Isaacs’ documentaries to do so. In return, they allow Isaacs to film the process.

results.title: The Hockey Player
results.overview: A documentary that follows Canadian-born defenseman Luke Prokop as he decides to become the first — and still only — professional athlete playing under contract to an NHL team to come out as gay. Growing up in Edmonton steeped in Canada’s tough, often homophobic hockey culture, and playing without gay role models throughout professional sports, Luke’s path to coming out of the closet has been neither easy nor obvious. The film charts Prokop’s personal journey against the backdrop of a professional hockey industry that has had, at best, an ambivalent relationship to diversity. As the film sensitively reveals, being publicly out certainly came as an earthquake to his family, especially his father Al, who as Luke’s mentor and sometime coach represents the most complex and moving relationship in the film.

results.title: The Pleasure Dome
results.overview: Ruan follows a strange man through the streets of downtown São Paulo into a public bathroom, where he begins an oniric journey of pleasure and discovery.

results.title: Born Melo
results.overview: This new, official documentary takes an intimate look into the life and legacy of Carmelo Anthony as he is inducted into the Hall of Fame and sees his son, Kiyan, launch his collegiate basketball career.

results.title: WHEEE
results.overview: Little Anna dreams of growing up and becoming part of the adult world. But when her mother and father begin to argue, she doesn’t just grow up magically fast—she even ages prematurely…

results.title: Pushers
results.overview: William and Birk are two first-year high school students, eager to experience everything youth has to offer. In an attempt to get noticed, Birk proposes a bold strategy: selling cocaine. With dreams of status, parties, and romance, their friendship is put to the test.

results.title: Three Wishes
results.overview: While cleaning out his grandmother's living room, a young man discovers a mysterious lamp and accidentally frees the spirit of an eccentric genie,

results.title: Hello Solace
results.overview: Haunted by her partner's death, a grieving girl retreats into isolation with an advanced empathy AI, but a fatal system glitch transforms her digital sanctuary into an infinite, nightmarish loop.

results.title: Tides Of Time
results.original_title: ในวันที่หลงทาง

results.title: コブクロ「KOBUKURO LIVE TOUR 2025“THIS IS MY HOMETOWN”」
results.original_title: コブクロ「KOBUKURO LIVE TOUR 2025“THIS IS MY HOMETOWN”」

results.title: The Wolf
results.overview: Yuan, a 60 year old former village mayor in Shanghai, seeks freedom through heartbreak, marriage and LGBTQ+ repression in modern China.

results.title: Disciples
results.overview: On the banks of the Ganges in Varanasi, two boys enter a revered Hindu school where lessons in ancient scripture blur into something more troubling.

results.title: Morpheus and Charon
results.overview: A throuple of queer elderly men deals with the proximity of death — Zito, who has been diagnosed with dementia, and his two lovers, Morpheus and Charon. As the illness progresses, the boundaries between dream and reality blur: Zito imagines his last days as if his whole life was a Brazilian samba musical extravaganza, while his partners in life take care of him until their last farewell.

results.title: An Encounter
results.overview: Desiring intimacy one Friday night, Eli rollerblades away from his friends to have sex for the first time with an older man he met online.

results.title: Vertical Remains
results.overview: Time ascends as history sinks. Thirty-two upward-tilting shots, across British Columbia’s Lower Mainland, excavate histories of Indigenous presence, colonial violence, and ecological transformation. As image fades from colour to monochrome and sound descends against the camera’s rise, chronology collapses. Archival images, composite landscapes, and a descending sonic register unsettle linear narration, reframing the present as accumulated residue, and the land emerges as an unresolved stratigraphic archive, where history persists vertically beneath contemporary space.

results.title: Đồng Quể: Of the Same Womb
results.original_title: Đồng Quể: Of the Same Womb
results.overview: Đồng Quê: Of the Same Womb follows 13 queer and trans Vietnamese artists returning to their ancestral homeland. The film holds space for grief, resilience, and reclamation, and for the connections between queer and trans Vietnamese people, their families, and the broader communities they come from.

results.title: Flow
results.overview: In Flow, a Chinese American young woman navigates lifelong pressure and expectations, working out what it means to live on her own timeline.

results.title: Waste Time: A Complicated Love Story
results.original_title: Waste Time: A Complicated Love Story
results.overview: Through a series of intimate vignettes, we follow a queer couple, a Black woman and an Indian woman, as they experience the beauty and fragility of love. From the spark of their first date to the quiet tenderness of their first kiss, and finally, the ache of their first fight, their story unfolds in fragments of memory and emotion. The film culminates in a music-driven sequence where one woman reflects on what was lost and questions whether love is worth returning to. Blending narrative cinema with music video elements, this short explores the rhythm of heartbreak, memory, and rediscovery through a deeply personal lens.

results.title: Edges of the Earth
results.overview: Edges of the Earth shows us a place where TCM and BDSM collide.

results.title: Letters to Nowhere
results.overview: In Letters to Nowhere, we see that sometimes, friendship breakups happen in the middle of the work week. Crashout status: imminent.

results.title: Standing Tree
results.overview: “Ceroxylon quindiuense,” the Quindío wax palm, is Colombia’s national tree. It embodies a perfect paradox for a country steeped in machismo, misogyny, and transphobia, as it is a plant with the ability to change its sex. It is a trans palm and the inspiration for Magdalena Morales, an Afro-Colombian trans leader, to join the Trans Community Network and plant a seed of rebellious light on the horizon of traditional Colombian Caribbean music. Her song of redemption rises above desolation and celebrates social struggles, from Palestine, the Congo, and Sudan to the streets of Bogotá’s Santa Fe neighborhood, where her trans sisters stand firm.

results.title: Tending To
results.overview: In Tending To, a group of twentysomethings gather around a midnight bonfire. The conversation starts light and doesn’t stay that way.

results.title: Flores Del Corazón
results.overview: In Flores Del Corazón, a human wanders, ponders their identity, and finds their way.

results.title: The Second Spring
results.overview: In The Second Spring, Oakland dancer, teacher, and choreographer Sarah Crowell redefines her relationship with her body and her craft as she moves through menopause, confronting what it means to age as a female athlete.

results.title: Hanuman Ansh
results.overview: After the death of his mother, a young boy leaves his home in grief, believing that only by finding God can he meet her again. His search takes him across temples, forests, rivers and villages, where he lives in silence, discipline and devotion, slowly shedding all attachments. Through years of wandering and inner struggle, he discovers that God is not found in escape from the world, but in serving it. As his compassion grows, so do stories of quiet miracles, healing, and grace. Renouncing identity and ownership, the boy transforms into Hanuman Ansh, Neem Karoli Baba, dedicating his life to feeding the hungry, loving all without distinction, and blessing humanity through humility, service and silent faith.

results.title: Wheels of Forgotten Dreams
results.overview: Within this labyrinth of US highways, 4 million trucks traverse vast landscapes, carrying 10.5 billion tons of freight annually. A substantial proportion of these drivers are immigrants, including both legal and undocumented individuals. Confined to truck cabins for years, they face limited prospects of deeper integration into American society, often remaining within their ethnic bubbles.  When envisioning a trucker burning rubber up and down the US highways, our three protagonists are far from the typical image that might come to mind. Still in the prime of life, an actress, a painter, and an engineer left everything behind to spend their lives behind the wheel of a truck in search of the elusive American dream.

results.title: Benigno
results.overview: There are people who spend their entire lives in the same house, their childhood home where their family history rests. Benigno, at eighty-eight years old, still sleeps, eats, and dreams in the home where he was born, the home that is rooted in the earth to reach for the sky. The house stands alone, alongside Benigno and his tortoise Totó, adrift in the limbo of memories, the ritual of daily life, and the anticipation of the final day. Adjacent to the house is his vegetable garden, which he visits daily to tend to his chickens and work the soil with the seeds inherited from his ancestors, which he ceremoniously catalogs and preserves.

results.title: Notes Unheard
results.overview: Notes Unheard follows a young Chinese violist studying in the UK while remaining closely connected to his father in China. Through calls, rehearsals, visits, and repeated conversations, subtle shifts gradually emerge within their relationship.

results.title: The Plastic Country
results.overview: The new film from leading youth ocean and climate champion Kal Glanznig (Rising Up) is an eye-opening investigation of the impact of plastic on our bodies and ecosystems.

results.title: Butterfly
results.overview: Set against the backdrop of New York City, Butterfly follows Jericha a teenage girl navigating the quiet chaos of adolescence. At home, her mother faces mounting challenges as they struggle to stay afloat. At school, Jericha endures ridicule. And within her inner circle, cracks are beginning to form, with her closest friends making dangerous choices. Through it all, dance becomes her sanctuary. It's where she finds control, freedom, and release. But as her environment grows increasingly unstable, Jericha must face the growing tension around her, and within her, to decide if she'll retreat into silence, or find the strength to push forward.

results.title: Deserto Branco
results.overview: Today is Saturday, all my friends are dead: The film follows Digitaria on tour through South America.

results.title: The Ascension of Cinema
results.overview: Short-film based in facts. How cinema became this big cultural phenomenon.

results.title: The Last Bateau
results.overview: In the quiet woods of East Texas, producer Brittani Mathis uncovers a wooden bateau built by her great-grandfather, Wyatt Moore, and a box of cassette tapes where his voice still lingers. Nearly fifty years after he recorded them, she returns to Caddo Lake to restore the last bateau he built. In doing so, she reconnects with the craft, memory, and lineage that shaped then both. Anchored around archival audio and quiet observation, this lyrical documentary moves like memory.

results.title: Basic Bandits
results.overview: Three friends get an opportunity to move up in the crime world by taking an unconventional job.

results.title: Chance
results.overview: Inspired by historical events, this episodic film explores the role of chance in human life and death.

results.title: The Forest
results.overview: A filmmaker attempts to make a documentary on a newly opened forest, only to find what’s really in it.

results.title: Never Stand Down: The Quraishi Family
results.original_title: Never Stand Down: The Quraishi Family
results.overview: This warm and thought-provoking film offers a lens into the Asian familial ways of love and acceptance. For Indian Pakistani American Khalid Quraishi, his daughter Zunaira’s announcement that she was ready to marry the woman of her dreams was a joyous, even miraculous, occasion. Having lived through the Partition, persecution, and the harrowing threat of nearly losing Zunaira to cancer, Khalid never once doubted what his Muslim faith had taught him to believe was most important of all: his love for his family.

results.title: Pude ver un fantasma desde mi ventana
results.original_title: Pude ver un fantasma desde mi ventana

results.title: The Endless Frontier
results.overview: Follows three scientists as their work moves between labs and field sites, from neurorobotics in Utah to immunology in New Jersey to ocean science in the South Pacific.

results.title: Maŋutji (Catching Eyes)
results.overview: Set in the Aboriginal community of Yirrkala in Arnhem Land, this love story explores how two teens navigate their mutual feelings while maintaining cultural boundaries and kinship.

results.title: Nikita Computer
results.overview: A techno-melodrama about the past, imaginary and present of Nikita Computer.

results.title: 99 писем обо всём
results.overview: An online love story before the invention of the internet.

results.title: Your Face is a Landscape
results.overview: A film-journey through fleeting and tender dreams, shot with a “loving” video camera.

results.title: To Face the Sea
results.overview: A small voyage shared amongst friends that leads to nothing, what a pity.

results.title: Gemini
results.overview: As a career-defining performance approaches, a young composer becomes unsettled by a piece of music that seems to surface unbidden, drawing him into a confrontation with his own self-doubt.

results.title: Hoppy Ending
results.overview: A cheerful Easter village, famous for its giant bunny mascots and pastel-colored egg hunts, hides a dark secret. Years ago, a corporate Easter mascot company mysteriously went bankrupt, and the mascots “disappeared” during the closing ceremony. Locals whisper about the “Hollow Hare,” a terrifying entity born from the mascots’ abandoned costumes and the children’s forgotten toys.

results.title: Hoppy Ending
results.overview: A cheerful Easter village, famous for its giant bunny mascots and pastel-colored egg hunts, hides a dark secret. Years ago, a corporate Easter mascot company mysteriously went bankrupt, and the mascots “disappeared” during the closing ceremony. Locals whisper about the “Hollow Hare,” a terrifying entity born from the mascots’ abandoned costumes and the children’s forgotten toys.

results.title: How to meet Someone
results.overview: The young Abigail receives unsettling instruction from a tutor while awaiting an encounter whose nature she does not yet know.

results.title: Alma
results.overview: A young woman, in the midst of caring for her dying father, must shoulder the weight of her world over the course of a day.

results.title: PEAK END
results.overview: "Hey Rin, let’s send a jam sandwich to space." Rin came to Kyoto from Seoul, and Sola came to Kyoto from Okinawa. They met at university and have since pursued filmmaking together. They like having fun and they like filming funny things and laughing together. They want to fly a jam sandwich. They want to shoplift a film camera. They want to trace Sora's family roots in Okinawa. The two sublimate their desires to filmmaking. For the two, film is like a magic wand. They transform it into all kinds of genres and put themselves in it. The two desire to know each other, but never compromise and, instead, accept their uncertain identities just to have the greatest conversation.

results.title: Our world is twisted
results.overview: Evan, an ordinary young man, wanted to be seen, admired. At all costs. Invisible for as long as he could remember, rejected, humiliated online, mocked in real life, he then becomes an executioner to finally be under the spotlight.

results.title: 2 of Hearts
results.overview: Alzira, a retired seamstress, starts having intense, passionate dreams when her gambling partner stops showing up to their games.

results.title: Grave of the Fireflies
results.overview: In the final months of World War II, 14-year-old Seita and his sister Setsuko are orphaned when their mother is killed during an air raid in Kobe, Japan. After a falling out with their aunt, they move into an abandoned bomb shelter. With no surviving relatives and their emergency rations depleted, Seita and Setsuko struggle to survive.

results.title: Beyond the Terminal
results.overview: Bus driver Chuang spends the entire day at work with his lively young daughter, Evonne. Their interactions reveal the deep bond they share, while also hinting at an issue that Chuang is reluctant to confront.

results.title: The Tiger of the East
results.overview: Andrés, a young Chilean cowboy and self-taught musician decides to leave the town where he lives to fulfill his life's dream; become a real musician and play in Mexico. The desire to give a song of his authorship to the Northern Tigers band will be the impulse that finally leads him to undertake this important journey.

results.title: All in light ebbed aside
results.original_title: Ogni cosa nella luce si ritrae
results.overview: Started as a filmdiary, “Ogni cosa nella luce si ritrae” is an attempt at assembling all the footage shot over the course of thirteen months through a logic capable of showing both its intimacy and distance. A hendiadys turned towards its incompleteness, towards the margin itself (here, each time: the film leader, the cut that links and separates the images), always and yet never entirely continuous/discontinuous, at the same time.

results.title: Little Bear Story
results.overview: Considered Nakayama’s masterpiece and awarded at the Festival International du Film Amateur in Cannes, Little Bear Story opens with a mother telling a story to her son, who struggles to fall asleep. The narrative explores themes of maternal love and independence, unfolding through bear puppets of a cub and its mother. The puppets were handmade by Nakayama’s wife, and the couple constructed an elaborate diorama in their home for the film’s production.

results.title: The Sea Where Smoke Can Be Seen
results.overview: A boy plays in the sand on a beach. He notices smoke rising from the slag heap of a nearby coal mine. A young woman appears before him and speaks gently to him. In her, he glimpses the image of his deceased mother, though she relates to him like a sister. The next day, he returns to the same spot, waiting patiently for her to reappear, only to find a marble buried in the sand.

results.title: Cruising Lesbiana
results.overview: Select characters from Barcelona's flinta community sit in a driving car and and talk about cruising, desire and different forms of spaces. Rough HDV material and selected images draw on the city of Barcelona and a fictional narrative of a cab driver who explores various forms of cruising areas, creating an experimental docu-fiction narrative.

results.title: Is There Life On Mars?
results.overview: March, 2028. A TV host who rebels against his superiors returns to the village where he spent his childhood with his brother, only to find even greater evil there.

results.title: You Are Abroad
results.overview: Alina and Diana share a profound closeness, yet the inevitability of their parting hangs over them.

results.title: Мы тебя хвалить не будем
results.overview: The story of Alena Lozovskaya, founder of the footwear and clothing brand Razumno.

results.title: Шаг назад навстречу
results.overview: A film journey through a nature reserve in the south of France, famous for its white wild horses and the special relationship between man and animal.

results.title: Your Name Means I Love You
results.original_title: Your Name Means I Love You
results.overview: A guy becomes infatuated with a girl named after a French pop song.

results.title: Pelo Lindo
results.overview: On her 90th birthday, Josefa Elizabeth Andrade reflects on the chapel she built for her son, Joaquín Rodas Andrade, forcibly disappeared during Guatemala’s armed conflict nearly forty years ago.

results.title: Trinity: The Story of The LOX
results.original_title: Trinity: The Story of The LOX
results.overview: Travel through time and reflect on the genesis, journey, and brotherhood of the multidimensional rap trio from Yonkers, The LOX.

results.title: DRUID
results.overview: 60 AD. Romans tighten their grip on Britannia. Druidism is hunted almost to extinction. after being driven out of their commune, Rhiain- a young druid and her master Gwen are forced to flee and traverse the wilds of Britannia in order to reach the sanctuary of the Druids - Ynys Môn. On their journey they will encounter great challenges and unlikely allies on a quest that will decide not only their survival, but the future of their way of life itself.

results.title: Walk Slow
results.original_title: ゆっくり あるく 川村浪子、84歳のダンス

results.title: A Great Sailor
results.overview: A sailor has a lucky catch

results.title: Gainesville Takes to the Streets
results.overview: A docu short film captured at the "No Kings" protests in Gainesville, GA.

results.title: The Lobby
results.overview: A ghost hunter suddenly no-clips through the ground.

results.title: Punk State
results.overview: Seven guests arrive for an exclusive performance inside a remote theatre, unaware that they are the show.

results.title: If You Need Me
results.overview: Nora's life, marked by a regimen of self-improvement and recovery from codependency, is interrupted when Callie appears on her doorstep, suitcase in tow, emanating vulnerability and chaos.

results.title: Manila Sunset
results.overview: When a sudden family death pulls a fractured Filipino-American family back under one roof, a week of funeral preparations becomes a final chance to reunite as their Lola (grandmother) slowly forgets them all.

results.title: The Jealous Bride
results.overview: As Meg prepares for her wedding, the return of a woman from her fiancé's past ignites a wave of jealousy she can't contain. Consumed by doubt, she soon spirals into a dangerous obsession that threatens to destroy her love, her faith and her future.

results.title: De duistere kant van Forum voor Democratie
results.original_title: De duistere kant van Forum voor Democratie
results.overview: What happens behind the scenes at Forum voor Democratie? For this documentary, PowNed spoke with multiple sources who have been involved with the party and its environment for years. They discuss the culture, ideology, and ambitions within the movement and share their experiences with topics such as conspiracy theories, ideas surrounding white supremacy, and dealing with critics. Why are they choosing to tell their story now?

results.title: three twenty-five
results.overview: The final twelve minutes of a couple's relationship as they realize they aren't ready to move in together.

results.title: Paranoid
results.overview: You might be wondering, what could possibly go wrong at a sleepover? Well, after five boys watch the scariest horror movie ever, everything goes wrong. But amid all the innocence, is there perhaps something dangerous lurking?

results.title: The Troll
results.overview: A TikTok megastar spirals after one cruel comment, stalking her troll in a descent that blurs fame, obsession, and revenge.

results.title: Brotherhood of the Court: Beginning
results.overview: An intimate sports documentary drama showcasing the historic rise of the Slovenian men's national volleyball team from 64th in the world rankings to a global powerhouse. Through archival footage and previously unseen behind-the-scenes and locker-room moments, the film reveals the genuine relationships, defeats, and unwavering bond of the boys who became brothers on and off the court.

results.title: Regular American Citizen
results.overview: From the world of BatFreak; Regular American Citizen must learn to either accept the life that's been forced upon him, or fight for a life of good that may not even exist.

results.title: Hidote
results.overview: A film by Samuel Teshager

results.title: Atypical
results.overview: Teenage girl (Mavis) finally comes face to face with a strange man that has been following her around for months now.

results.title: Nizhal
results.overview: NIZHAL follows twin sisters Ramya and Saranya. Saranya is a trainee doctor, and Ramya helps their vendor parents. Tragedy strikes when Saranya’s friend Lakshmi is brutally murdered in the hospital lab by Guna, the CEO's son, and his gang. Ramya witnesses the crime and narrowly survives a deadly attack by them. Driven by fury, Saranya seeks vengeance and puts the killers on their deathbeds. Ironically, her lover Raghu takes charge as the sub-inspector for this very case. When Raghu uncovers the truth, a gripping battle begins between law, love, and ultimate justice.

results.title: The Travelling Actors
results.overview: Awarded at the Festival International du Film Amateur in Cannes in 1962, four years after its completion, The Travelling Actors centres on Misuko Chikushi, a travelling actor of Russian descent and the blue-eyed leader of a theatre troupe. The documentary follows the troupe and their performances, while offering an intimate glimpse of Chikushi’s life as a mother.

results.title: On a Clear Autumn Day
results.overview: A young female server who attempts to return a souvenir left behind by a group of upper-class women, inadvertently reveals her own self-consciousness and inner life, unfolding through a reflective monologue on social status and self-worth.

results.title: Our Choir Has Always Been Travelling
results.original_title: Our Choir Has Always Been Travelling
results.overview: This animated story charts the international legacy and intergenerational impact of the Ntaria Choir, formerly known as Hermannsburg Choir from the Northern Territory.

results.title: Урожай
results.overview: A surreal fairy tale set in an Uzbek pastoral.

results.title: Мы не знакомимся
results.overview: A place of power for informals: chronicles of youth parties in Kitay-gorod.

results.title: Чужая версия меня
results.overview: A boy attempts to understand a girl through the memories of others. As different versions emerge, the truth becomes unclear. A story about perception, memory, and the impossibility of a single truth.

results.title: The Horizon from the Tip of the Nose
results.original_title: The Horizon from the Tip of the Nose
results.overview: Diagnosed as completely nearsighted at age 6, I have spent my life in a blur. A journey through the not always clear twists and turns of ophthalmology.

results.title: Source Connection
results.overview: When an investigative reporter shows up to meet her source, he proves reticent at first, but then gives the information she's looking for. Together they're working to uncover the ills of the city.

results.title: Guided by Horses
results.overview: In the stunning beauty of the Kimberley, this feature length documentary is a cinematic story of hope, rising from the quiet, unexpectedly powerful bond between a cast of young people and horses, who are participating in a uniquely special sanctuary created by Aboriginal researcher Professor Juli Coffin.
